name: testa-platform
description: Testa frontend tracker + edge worker + event collector

scripts.diagrams: for f in docs/architecture/diagrams/*.mmd; do npx -p @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli mmdc -i "$f" -o "${f%.mmd}.png" -b white -w 2400 -H 1200 && npx -p @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli mmdc -i "$f" -o "${f%.mmd}.svg" -b transparent; done
